response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware development — all central to the role. His experience is predominantly in web, mobile, and general-purpose software using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of embedded firmware or security protocol implementation.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Extensive background in DevOps, CI/CD, and system infrastructure setup
concerns: No proven experience with C in embedded Linux or kernel-level development
Lacks native Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No exposure to LAN-switch security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X
